source.description: Six-panel raster contact sheet generated for the July 7, 2026 bowl of macaroni marker lesson, reviewed before cropping.
source.notes: Prompt required one consistent bold marker bowl of elbow macaroni, no sticker or badge border, no embedded labels, arrows, numbers, signatures, watermarks, or fake UI.

process_strategy: The sequence builds the bowl, rim, noodle pile, individual elbows, bowl stripe, marker cheese color, and small shadows before the final panel only thickens outlines and clarifies existing color and noodle details.

final_elements.name: rounded bowl
final_elements.description: A simple rounded bowl with a wide oval rim.

final_elements.name: rim opening
final_elements.description: An oval opening that holds the macaroni pile.

final_elements.name: macaroni mound
final_elements.description: A loose mound of noodles sitting inside the rim.

final_elements.name: individual elbow noodles
final_elements.description: Clear C-shaped elbow macaroni pieces across the mound.

final_elements.name: bowl stripe
final_elements.description: A playful colored stripe across the front of the bowl.

final_elements.name: cheesy yellow fill
final_elements.description: Bright yellow-orange marker fill inside the already-drawn noodles.

final_elements.name: small sauce shadows
final_elements.description: Darker orange accents on existing elbow noodles.

frames.visible_job: Blocks in the rounded bowl and wide oval rim with loose marker construction.
Adds the main macaroni mound inside the existing bowl rim.
Separates the mound into visible C-shaped elbow noodles.
Adds a simple marker stripe to the already-drawn bowl front and a small shadow underneath.
Fills the existing elbow noodles with yellow-orange marker and adds small sauce shadows.

final_step.visible_job: Thickens the bowl and noodle outlines, evens the marker fill, clarifies the bowl stripe, and reinforces the existing sauce shadows.

rejection_checks: No bowl, rim, noodle mound, elbow noodle, stripe, color fill, or sauce shadow should first appear in the final image.
No frame may ink, fill, color, shade, or clean a feature that was not already visible in an earlier frame.
No adjacent frame should look unchanged at card size.
The final image must keep the same pose, scale, and placement as the step frames.
